title: Detection of Bacteria in Antibiotic-Treated Diatom Cultures and Cell Harvesting
author: Francesco Manfellotto
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.btt5nnq6

steps.title: For the antibiotic treatment to obtain...
steps.instruction: For the antibiotic treatment to obtain axenic cultures, see the published protocol: Axenic Diatoms cultures protocol dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgudjws6 DMI6000 b (Fully Automated Inverted Research Microscope, LEICA, https://www.leica-microsystems.com/products/light-, https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/files/dagw5vhn.jpg ) Transfer 1 mL of Culture in a new 2 mL tube.

steps.title: Add 1,6% of neutralized formaldehyde to...
steps.instruction: Add 1,6% of neutralized formaldehyde to fix cells and mix gently by inversion

steps.title: Add 1uL of DAPI 1 mg/mL...
steps.instruction: Add 1uL of DAPI 1 mg/mL and mix gently by inversion. Keep away from direct light 4,6-Diamidino-2-Phenylindole, Dihydrochloride (DAPI) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #D1306

steps.title: Transfer cells in a 35mm glass bottom dish
steps.instruction: Transfer cells in a 35mm glass bottom dish. µ-Dish 35 mm, high Glass Bottom (A 35 mm imaging dish with a glass bottom for use in TIRF, single molecule and super-resolution microscopy applications, ibidi, https://ibidi.com/dishes/176--dish-35-mm-high-glas, https://ibidi.com/dishes/176--dish-35-mm-high-glass-bottom.html?gclid=CjwKCAjwu5CDBhB9EiwA0w6sLRCp_f1-NVcLuPmh0y2m2hKhe57pQ0Sl-TTwo4X265451aOxRI_45BoC2XsQAvD_BwE ) Incubate for 10 min away from direct light to perimt cells sedimentation

steps.title: Use an inverted microscope with fluorescence excitation
steps.instruction: Use an inverted microscope with fluorescence excitation. * We use a Leica DMI 6000 B microscope. Set light sources: bright-field Fluorescence for chlorophyll (580 / 604 nm) Fluorescence for DAPI (364 / 454 nm)

steps.title: Assess bacteria absence-presence in the cultures
steps.instruction: Assess bacteria absence-presence in the cultures. Move across the plate, focusing on the cells and on the bottom of the dish.

steps.title: Filter cells on MF-Millipore™ Membrane Filter, 1
steps.instruction: Filter cells on MF-Millipore™ Membrane Filter, 1.2 µm pore size, gridded 47 mm.

steps.title: Move the filter in a new...
steps.instruction: Move the filter in a new 50 mL tube using tweezers

steps.title: Rinse the filter with 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Rinse the filter with 1 mL of clean medium using a pasteur pipette pipet gently, to avoid cell lysis

steps.title: Collect the resuspended cells in a new 15 mL tube
steps.instruction: Collect the resuspended cells in a new 15 mL tube

steps.title: Pellet cells by centrifugation 15 min
steps.instruction: Pellet cells by centrifugation 15 min. 2000 g 18°C and discard supernatant

steps.title: Freeze pellet immediately in liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Freeze pellet immediately in liquid nitrogen
